---
title: "About LASER"
page-layout: full
---

**LASER (Laboratory for Autonomous Systems Engineering Research)** is a research group in the Department of Chemical Engineering at Sunchon National University, Republic of Korea. The lab is led by [Prof. Kyung Hwan Ryu](/members.html).

Designing and operating complex engineered systems often relies on sustained expert experience and know-how across experiment design, operation, and decision-making. LASER asks a single question: how much of that reliance can be reduced through principled, verifiable computation?

Our research connects experimentation, modeling, optimization, monitoring, and decision-making under physical constraints and uncertainty. We are particularly interested in data-scarce and high-consequence settings where physical consistency, uncertainty awareness, and reliable assessment matter. Our work spans chemical, electrochemical, and bioprocess systems.

---

## Joining LASER {#joining-laser}

We welcome inquiries from students and researchers interested in autonomous engineering, process systems, and data-efficient scientific computation.

### Researchers & Postdoctoral Fellows

We welcome applicants with backgrounds in process systems engineering, modeling and optimization, control, uncertainty-aware decision-making, or scientific machine learning. Applicants from related quantitative disciplines, including Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Applied Mathematics, Data Science, and Biology, are also encouraged to apply if they are interested in complex engineered systems.

### Graduate Students (M.S. / Ph.D.)

No prior research experience is required. We primarily look for intellectual curiosity, a solid mathematical or engineering foundation, and a genuine interest in solving problems through computation. Research in the lab broadly includes autonomous experimentation, modeling and optimization under uncertainty, and monitoring and control of complex engineered systems.

## How to Apply {#how-to-apply}

Please send the following to **khryu@scnu.ac.kr**:

- CV or resume
- Transcript (for graduate applicants)
- Brief statement of research interests (1 page or less)
- Any relevant publications, reports, or research experience (if available)

::: {.callout-note}
## Prospective Graduate Students
For formal graduate admissions information at Sunchon National University, please also visit the [university website](https://www.scnu.ac.kr/neweng/main.do).
:::

---

## Contact {#contact}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="38%"}
### Location

Department of Chemical Engineering, Sunchon National University  
255 Jungang-ro, Suncheon, Jeollanam-do 57922, Republic of Korea

### Contact Information

- **Email**: khryu@scnu.ac.kr
- **Office**: D3-305
- **Phone**: +82 61-750-3588
:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="58%"}
<iframe
  src="https://www.google.com/maps?q=Sunchon+National+University,+255+Jungang-ro,+Suncheon,+Jeollanam-do,+Republic+of+Korea&output=embed&hl=en"
  width="100%" height="260" style="border:0; border-radius:6px;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy">
</iframe>
:::

::::
